title: Remote Work Realities:
body:
Remote Work Realities:
Evolving Insurance Needs for a Distributed Workforce

As the workforce becomes increasingly remote, traditional insurance models must evolve to address new challenges. This session explores how key lines of coverage: workers comp, general liability, cyber insurance, and employment practices liability insurance (EPLI), and health/disability benefits respond to risks tied to telecommuting. Understand the legal nuances of multi-state operations, uncover potential coverage gaps, and evaluate employer obligations in maintaining secure and compliant remote work environments. Gain valuable insights into trends shaping underwriting practices, technology’s role in risk mitigation, and how insurers are adapting to the future of remote employment.

Webinar Details

Remote Work Realities: Evolving Insurance Needs for a Distributed Workforce

Remote and hybrid work models are changing the insurance landscape. Discover how workers comp, liability, cyber, and EPLI, and health coverage are impacted by telecommuting. Learn how to navigate state laws, investigate remote claims, and manage coverage gaps as employers adapt to evolving work environments.

Topics

  • Explore how workers comp applies to injuries in remote work environments
  • Examine general liability and employer liability concerns for home offices
  • Understand cyber insurance gaps and security risks unique to telecommuting
  • Evaluate EPLI coverage challenges including remote harassment and discrimination claims
  • Learn how health and disability benefits are adapting to support remote workers
